title: Implement persistent mobile authentication state
goal: Manage login, registration, logout, token persistence, session restoration, and role state in React Native.
implementation_steps: Use expo-secure-store for storing the Sanctum token.
Store user and role in React state.
On app start, read token from SecureStore.
If getMe succeeds, set user, role, role_label, and mobile_features.
If getMe fails with 401, clear SecureStore and reset auth state.
Expose isAuthenticated, isLoading, user, token, role, roleLabel, and mobileFeatures.
Ensure logout calls backend logout if token exists, then clears local state even if backend request fails.
acceptance_criteria: Token is restored after app restart.
Invalid token clears local auth state.
Role label User is available for borrower accounts.
All screens can read auth state through a hook/provider.
edge_cases: Backend is offline during app startup.
User logs out while network is unavailable.
API key is missing from mobile env.
